The Exorcism of Emily Rose (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $75,072,454Details
International Box Office $69,456,624
Worldwide Box Office $144,529,078
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,054,300 (40.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.50 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,981 opening theaters/3,045 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $140,072,781

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 9th, 2005 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: December 20th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material, including intense/frightening sequences and disturbing images.
Running Time: 119 minutes
Plot point: Exorcism, Possessed, Religious
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Aramaic
